description: 网关配置向导 (端口/绑定/认证/Tailscale)

replacements.{ value: \"lan\", label: \"LAN (0.0.0.0): { value: "lan", label: "局域网 (0.0.0.0)", hint: "本地网络可达" }
replacements.{ value: \"tailnet\", label: \"Tailnet (: { value: "tailnet", label: "Tailnet (Tailscale IP)", hint: "通过 Tailscale 可达" }
replacements.{ value: \"auto\", label: \"Auto (Loopba: { value: "auto", label: "自动 (回环 -> 局域网)", hint: "优先尝试回环" }
replacements.{ value: \"custom\", label: \"Custom IP\: { value: "custom", label: "自定义 IP", hint: "绑定到一个本地地址" }
replacements.hint: \"Recommended default (local + rem: hint: "推荐默认 (本地 + 远程)"
replacements.\"Tailscale exposure requires bind=loopb: "Tailscale 暴露需要 bind=loopback。将绑定地址切换为 loopback。"
replacements.\"Tailscale Funnel requires password aut: "Tailscale Funnel 需要密码认证。将网关认证切换为密码。"
replacements.placeholder: \"Needed for multi-machine: placeholder: "多机或非回环访问需要"
